1.premise: A Black person having a British accent is widely jarring but rarely admitted aloud.
A woman being unusually close with her dog could mean she's having sex with it.
"Pull-out game" can mean contraception withdrawal or stripping copper wire.
"Strip" can mean a pubic hair style or a war-ravaged territory.
